messages.content: # Here is how to fix “ Track is Misconfigured. Node “ AC_REVERB_0 ” from “ [REVERB_0] ” used for track audio is missing

# This error is completely harmless and does not cause the game to crash in any way. If you would like to remove it, follow the rest of this guide.


# Step 1
> **[Download and install 7zip.](https://www.7-zip.org/)** **7zip** is free.

# Step 2
> Next, simply reinstall the track manually following <#1457475437809631416>  and make sure to **NOT** use content manager
